blocks.content: She pulled a single breath in. She steadied herself. She looked at him.

blocks.speaker: Pastor
blocks.content: To have and to hold, from this day forward —

blocks.speaker: Cassandra
blocks.content: To have and to hold, from this day forward —
She stopped crying. She said it clearly.

blocks.speaker: Pastor
blocks.content: To love and to cherish, until death do us part.
She looked at him. She said it directly into his eyes, the way she'd learned to say the true things — plainly, without protection, with the full weight of what she meant.

blocks.speaker: Cassandra
blocks.content: To love and to cherish, until death do us part.
